list.name: project
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT project FROM sessions ORDER BY project

panels.title: Token Consumption by Project
panels.description:
Top 10 projects ranked by total tokens. Identifies which codebases drive the most usage.

Note: total tokens include input + output + cache_read + cache_creation. Cache reads are dominated by conversation overhead (system prompt + message history re-fed each turn), so numbers will be much higher than input+output-only views.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND s.project IN ($project) GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Project Activity Over Time
panels.description: Daily token consumption stacked by project. Reveals which projects are active and when.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp) AS time, s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND s.project IN ($project) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tool Mix by Project
panels.description:
Top 10 projects by total tokens, with each bar stacked by tool. Bar height shows total project usage; segment sizes show which tools each project leans on (e.g., Read/Bash-heavy = exploration, Edit/Write-heavy = active coding, Task-heavy = self-orchestration via subagents).

Note: total tokens include input + output + cache_read + cache_creation. Cache reads carry the conversation's accumulated context, so a tool called late in a session inherits a large prefix that isn't unique to that tool. Numbers will be higher than the input+output-only ranking in the Prompt Cost dashboard.

targets.rawSql: WITH top_projects AS (SELECT s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS proj_total FROM sessions s JOIN messages m ON m.session_id = s.session_id JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND s.project IN ($project) GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY proj_total DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT s.project, m.tool_name, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id JOIN top_projects tp ON tp.project = s.project WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND m.tool_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.project, m.tool_name, tp.proj_total ORDER BY tp.proj_total DESC, tokens DESC

panels.title: Archetype Mix by Project (%)
panels.description:
Top 10 projects by total archetype tokens, with each bar normalized to 100% and segmented by archetype.

Bash subcategories are rolled up:
- read / search / git-read → exploration
- test / build / deps → build_test
- infra-* / db → infra_ops
- fileops / git-write / exec → shell_ops

Non-Bash tools are mapped by name:
- Read / Grep / Glob → exploration
- Edit / Write / MultiEdit → active_coding
- Task / Agent / TaskCreate / TaskUpdate / TaskList / TaskOutput / TaskStop → self_orchestration
- WebFetch / WebSearch / ToolSearch → research
- mcp__* → mcp

Use this to compare *kinds* of work across projects independent of volume.

targets.rawSql: WITH top_projects AS (SELECT s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens)::numeric AS proj_total FROM sessions s JOIN messages_classified mc ON mc.session_id = s.session_id JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid WHERE mc.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND mc.archetype IS NOT NULL AND s.project IN ($project) GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY proj_total DESC LIMIT 10), by_archetype AS (SELECT s.project, mc.archetype, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens)::numeric AS tokens FROM sessions s JOIN messages_classified mc ON mc.session_id = s.session_id JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = mc.message_uuid JOIN top_projects tp ON tp.project = s.project WHERE mc.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND mc.archetype IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.project, mc.archetype) SELECT b.project, b.archetype, (b.tokens / NULLIF(tp.proj_total, 0))::float AS pct FROM by_archetype b JOIN top_projects tp ON tp.project = b.project ORDER BY tp.proj_total DESC

panels.title: Sessions Per Project
panels.description: Summary table with session count, total tokens, and date range per project. Full path shown in project_path column.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.project, MAX(s.project_path) AS project_path, COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS total_tokens, MIN(s.started_at) AS first_session, MAX(s.started_at) AS last_session FROM sessions s JOIN messages m ON m.session_id = s.session_id JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE s.started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND s.is_subagent = false AND s.project IN ($project) GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
